heading: Omitted
label: 5001 to 5007 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 5001 to 5007 were omitted pursuant to section 5007 which provided that this chapter and the National Commission on Agriculture and Rural Development Policy established by this chapter terminated 5 years after .Dec. 23, 1985Section 5001, , , ; , , , defined “Commission”, “Governor”, and “State”.Pub. L. 99–198, title XVII, § 172399 Stat. 1637Pub. L. 100–71, title V, § 519(a)(2)101 Stat. 475Dec. 23, 1985July 11, 1987Section 5003, , , , related to studies to be conducted by the Commission.Pub. L. 99–198, title XVII, § 172499 Stat. 1638Dec. 23, 1985Section 5004, , , , provided for annual reports to President and Congress.Pub. L. 99–198, title XVII, § 172599 Stat. 1639Dec. 23, 1985Section 5005, , , , provided for administrative operations of the Commission, member compensation, appointment and compensation of director and staff, and maintenance of records.Pub. L. 99–198, title XVII, § 172699 Stat. 1639Dec. 23, 1985Section 5006, , , , authorized appropriations to carry out chapter.Pub. L. 99–198, title XVII, § 172799 Stat. 1640Dec. 23, 1985Section 5007, , , , provided that this chapter and the Commission terminate five years after .Pub. Short TitleSection 1721 of subtitle C (§§ 1721–1728) of title XVII of , as amended by , , , provided that this subtitle, which enacted this chapter, could be cited as the “National Commission on Agriculture and Rural Development Policy Act of 1985”.Pub.
